arts.ttl: Harry Maguire reveals Manchester United dressing room reaction to half-time change vs Leicester City
arts.sum: Harry Maguire headed in a very late winner for Man United against Leicester City in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: 'Not important' - Man United head coach Ruben Amorim responds to Alejandro Garnacho transfer links
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho could have left Manchester United in the winter transfer window but he stayed put and is now one of the brightest attackers in the squad.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rejects Erik ten Hag theory as Man Utd boss dismisses FA Cup hope
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim saw Manchester United keep their FA Cup hopes alive but the new manager is not viewing cup success as the saviour of their season given their struggles

arts.ttl: Inside Marcus Rashford's first week at Aston Villa: Training on his days off, the truth about THAT unveiling photo and 'striker whisperer' Unai Emery's tailor-made plan to get Man United outcast back to his best
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Marcus Rashford, the exiled prince of Manchester United, has come to the place where footballers mix with true royalty.

arts.ttl: 'Not Fergie time, offside time' - Leicester rue lack of VAR as Man Utd progress
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy says his Leicester side were beaten not in 2Fergie time, but offside time" as Harry Maguire's controversial late winner sends Manchester United into the FA Cup fifth round.

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Amorim must solve Man Utd's slow starts at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Sky Sports News reporter Anton Toloui reviews Manchester United's FA Cup fourth round win against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Man Utd 2 Leicester City 1 in FA Cup fourth round
arts.sum: When a team doesn't perform and doesn't improve, it's the coach. Then in the second half, we played a little bit better with a little bit more speed and winning second balls.

arts.ttl: Amorim: Utd win 'nothing to do with Fergie time'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim said his side's last-gasp winner against Leicester City in the FA Cup fourth-round showed the team believed until the final whistle, but it had "nothing to do with Fergie time."

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson is caught YAWNING on live TV in the Old Trafford stands - after Roy Keane called Man United 'boring' in Leicester FA Cup win
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson was spotted yawning during the Man United's FA Cup clash with Leicester, after the club's former captain Roy Keane had branded the team 'boring'.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy says not ruling United winner out for offside ‘unacceptable’
arts.sum: United head coach Ruben Amorim acknowledged that his side rode their luck.
